steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The claim to illustrate: the soldiers’ collective mood becomes strongly affected by the strenuous conditions of the journey. The correct quotation must show (1) physical hardship and (2) a resulting emotional or psychological effect on the group.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — 'The sierra is clad in gala colors…': Describes the landscape’s appearance — no soldiers, no mood, no hardship. ✗
  • Choice B — 'All day long they rode through the canyon, up and down steep hills…': Describes the terrain and pace but shows no effect on the soldiers’ mood or mental state. ✗
  • Choice C — 'Then, hurriedly, they took the Juchipila canyon northward…': Mentions movement and direction — no hardship causing a mood shift. ✗
  • Choice D — 'The sun, beating down upon them, dulled their minds and bodies and presently they were silent': The sun (strenuous condition) directly causes a collective mental and behavioral effect (dulled minds, silence). This is the only choice that shows the causal link the claim requires. ✓
That matches choice D — D is correct.
